title: Tilray Brands Poised for U.S. Medical Cannabis Push
text: Tilray Brands is poised for a U.S. medical cannabis push following federal rescheduling. The company is uniquely positioned with over 7 million square feet of cultivation capacity and recognized expertise in pharmaceutical-grade cannabis production. Tilray is evaluating participation in the CMMI pilot program to supply medical cannabis to healthcare providers. While rescheduling opens doors for research and business opportunities, full legalization remains necessary for Canadian producers to directly supply U.S. consumers.
